transactions.desc: Dzierwa was promoted to Double-A Chesapeake on Sunday, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
Emerson was called up from Triple-A Tacoma and is batting ninth in Sunday's series finale versus the Padres, Daniel Kramer of MLB.com reports.
The Dodgers acquired Lauer from the Blue Jays on Sunday in exchange for cash considerations.
Yorke was optioned to Triple-A Indianapolis after Sunday's 6-0 loss to the Phillies, Colin Beazley of the Pittsburgh Post-Gazette reports.
The Toronto Blue Jays traded LHP Eric Lauer to the Los Angeles Dodgers.
The Dodgers recalled Gervase from Triple-A Oklahoma City on Sunday.
The Dodgers recalled McDermott from Triple-A Oklahoma City on Sunday.
The Dodgers optioned Barnes to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Sunday.
The Rockies optioned Agnos to Triple-A Albuquerque on Sunday.
The Rockies recalled Castano from Triple-A Albuquerque on Sunday.
The Padres optioned Jacob to Triple-A El Paso on Sunday.
The Angels optioned Manoah to Triple-A Salt Lake on Sunday.
The Angels reinstated Rodrigez (shoulder) from the 15-day injured list to start Sunday's game against the Dodgers.
The Cubs selected Blach's contract from Triple-A Iowa on Sunday.
The Cubs optioned Assad to Triple-A Iowa on Sunday.
The Tigers activated Vest (forearm) from the 15-day IL on Sunday, Cody Stavenhagen of The Athletic reports.
The Guardians activated Walters (lat) from the 15-day injured list Sunday and optioned him to Triple-A Columbus, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
The Brewers designated Strzelecki for assignment Sunday.
The Brewers recalled Gasser from Triple-A Nashville to start Sunday's game against the Twins.
The Reds recalled Franco from Triple-A Louisville on Sunday.
The Reds optioned Mey to Triple-A Louisville on Sunday.
The Reds designated Hinds for assignment Sunday.
The Orioles recalled Foster from Triple-A Norfolk on Sunday.
Baltimore optioned Walker to Triple-A Norfolk following Saturday's game against Washington.
The Reds selected Higgins' contract from Triple-A Louisville on Sunday.
Toronto recalled Macko from Triple-A Buffalo on Sunday.
The Pirates reinstated Mangum (hamstring) from the 10-day injured list Sunday.
Brooks cleared waivers and was outrighted to Triple-A Durham by the Rays on Sunday.
The Rays recalled Williams from Triple-A Durham on Sunday.
Atlanta signed Gomber to a minor-league contract Saturday and assigned the 32-year-old southpaw to Triple-A Gwinnett, per MLB's transaction log.
